metadata_mapping.scene_title: JSON-LD VideoObject > name  (also og:title, also h1.title in HTML)
metadata_mapping.date: JSON-LD VideoObject > uploadDate (ISO-8601, strip to YYYY-MM-DD)
metadata_mapping.description: JSON-LD VideoObject > description  (WARNING: often just star-rating emoji, not a synopsis)
metadata_mapping.cover_image: JSON-LD VideoObject > thumbnailUrl  (static.gayporntube.com CDN URL, string not array)
metadata_mapping.performers: Not available — site has no model/performer pages; only uploader (/user/{name}) is present
metadata_mapping.tags: CSS: div.video-info-tags > a  (anchor text, links to /search/videos/{tag}/)
metadata_mapping.categories: CSS: div.video-info-categories > a  (anchor text, links to /channels/{id}/{slug}/page1.html)

date: Value format: '2026-05-10T21:54:10Z' — split on T and take date part
description: WARNING: value is often '⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐' (star rating emoji) rather than a real synopsis
If description matches only whitespace/stars/emoji, return empty string
cover_image: Value is a plain string (not array): 'https://static.gayporntube.com/contents/videos_screenshots/{bucket}/{id}/preview.jpg?v=1'
tags: CSS selector: 'div.video-info-tags > a' — collect anchor text
categories: CSS selector: 'div.video-info-categories > a' — collect anchor text (e.g. 'Ass Play', 'Muscle Boys')
These are the closest thing to sub-studio/channel tags on this site
Consider merging categories into the tags list for Stash

search_strategy.notes: Search returns a standard HTML results page with no Cloudflare block. Video links follow href pattern: /video/{id}/{slug}. Use difflib SequenceMatcher or similar to pick the best title match from results.

fragment_matching_strategy.notes: Use scene title from fragment to build a search query. Confidence depends on title quality in the user's filename. Treat as best-effort.

anti_bot_or_access_notes: No Cloudflare protection detected on scene pages, search pages, or homepage.
Standard Firefox/Linux UA with Accept: text/html and Cookie: age_verified=1 is sufficient.
Python urllib and curl subprocess both work fine.
age_verified=1 cookie is required to bypass the age gate.
known_limitations: No performer metadata — site is uploader-based. performerByURL is not supported.
description field in JSON-LD is often star-rating emoji only — sanitise before returning.
Tags are sparse: 0–2 per scene is typical.
Category links point to /channels/{id}/{slug}/ — useful as additional tags but not a clean studio field.
sceneByName confidence depends on title match quality; titles in filenames may not match site titles exactly.
sources: Live scene HTML fetched from https://www.gayporntube.com/video/2041527/ass-addiction with age_verified=1 cookie
Live search HTML fetched from https://www.gayporntube.com/search/videos/?q=bareback with age_verified=1 cookie
Repository handoff notes in PERPLEXITY_TO_CODEX_HANDOFF.md and CODEX_PROMPT.md
